name: Double Crusted Spinach Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the crust batter into 2 sections.
2. Line a 9 X 11 pan with the crust batter.
3. Mix together the filling ingredients and pour them into the crust.
4. Cover with the top crust.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until the crust is light brown.
WARNING: Recipe from "One Million Recipes CD" busted by Judy R.
